title: magnolia × lenneana
intro: Magnolia × lenneana, also known as the Lenne magnolia, is a hybrid plant between Magnolia liliiflora and Magnolia denudata. It is a flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions, and relieving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the bark and flowers of Magnolia × lenneana are typically dried and used in infusions or tinctures to make teas, tonics, and other remedies.
